textDisplay: Daisy Edgar-Jones is beautiful. The amount of stunning actresses in Hollywood, its just not fair

A Prayfish.
okay but how are we supposed to tell the two male leads apart when they look like twins
Not actually read the book, going to see the film today (Infinity showing) looks a great film
Excellent movie. Best of the summer. What an actress Daisy proved to be!
i'm wondering if jodie's going to even be in this movie at all...

Spoiler alert:
WORST acting I’ve ever seen for a main character..She had a befuddled look on her face the entire time (and her nose is weird and distracting). The story is highly implausible and why the heck boyfriend number one with the most reason to murder boyfriend number two was never questioned or testified is beyond dumb!!!!! If you felt any connection to her or sympathy for her, you’ll be betrayed by the ending. 1 star ⭐️ only because of the supporting actors..and Taylor..otherwise, this movie was a waste of time.
Fantastic movie. They stuck to the storyline really well and did the book a great justice. Highly recommended movie.
Actually my focus was on the character not to clothing, loved the dipiction of Kya
The girl in yellow at 1:53 looks so much like Emma Watson 😁
Saw the movie last night after reading the book. GO!
The movie was incredible! Well done to everyone involved! Highly recommended 🍿
I have been waiting on this movie since I saw the trailers.
